title: Cost Allowability Principles & Examples — Special Workshop Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-12-09 Cost Allowability Special Workshop, opening presentation 'Cost Allowability Principles & Examples' by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Walks through federal Uniform Guidance allowability principles (allowable, allocable, reasonable, consistent) and worked examples at MSU. First of four sequential workshop decks.
